title: [codereview-2] T-Deck gateway WiFi backhaul: missing stack size and TC_TX overrides from Heltec config
description: T-Deck conf now enables WiFi but does not include the NET_TC_TX_COUNT=1, larger LICHEN_LORA_L2_RX_STACK_SIZE, NET_RX/TX_STACK_SIZE from heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu.conf. This may cause deadlocks or stack overflows on border router with RPL and CoAP. Add them to avoid regression. Also add the link epoch persistence and RX1 delay.
close_reason: Added missing CONFIG_FLASH/NVS/SETTINGS deps + detailed comments for LINK_EPOCH_PERSIST and RX1_DELAY to t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf to match Heltec gateway pattern. Stack size/TC_TX overrides already present. Completed 3 independent codereview passes (project-LICHEN-89ph, project-LICHEN-g6p7, project-LICHEN-yq5f) with no P0-P2 findings. bd ready --limit 5 executed. Verified config consistency for WiFi gateway to prevent deadlock/overflow/replay issues.
